title: National Blood Donor Week Act
description: National Blood Donor Week Act (National Blood Donor Week Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Blood Donor Week Act .

provisions.title: National Blood Donor Week
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the week in which June 14 occurs shall be known as “National Blood Donor Week”.
